title: Recursive Tree Data Structure
scenario: Generate a recursive tree data structure in JSON format representing a hierarchical organization with the following nodes: Root (CEO), Children (3), and Grandchildren (9). Each node should have a unique ID and name. The root node should have three children (names: John, Emily, Michael), each of whom has three grandchildren (names: Sarah, David, Olivia, James, Ava, William, Isabella, Ethan, Lily).
constraints: Must contain exactly 13 levels of nesting
Each node must have a unique ID and name
All node names must start with a capital letter

evaluationCriteria.description: Is the JSON syntax correct, well-formed, and adheres to the structure described in the scenario?
Do all nodes have unique IDs and names starting with a capital letter, and is the tree structure correct with exactly 13 levels of nesting?
Are the child-grandparent relationships correctly established in the JSON structure?
